title: REDUCED FARES - 211info
text: TRIMET TICKET OFFICE REDUCED FARES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides reduced fare for TriMet services including bus, MAX, WES, Portland Streetcar, or C-TRAN. Discounts are available on 2 1/2 hours, day, or monthly passes. Eligibility: Individuals who meet one or more of the following criteria: -Age 65 and older -On Medicare -Have a verifiable mental or physical disability -On OHP/Medicaid, SNAP, TANF, Free and Reduced Price Lunch Programs, HUD, LIHEAP, EDRC, or WIC -Ages 18-64 and meet income requirements -Ages 7-17 -Grades 9-12 or studying for GED -Veteran or active duty military Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 238-7433 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Customer Service (503) 238-7433 Intake (503) 962-2455 Accessibility Help [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: $1.40 per 2.5 hour pass; $2.80 day pass; $28 monthly pass DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, Spanish applications are available online AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm Services: Transportation Passes Transportation Passes * Disabilities Issues Transportation Passes * Older Adult/Aging Issues Transportation Passes * Public Assistance Issues Transportation Passes * Youth Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
